# Oxygen UI — LLM Directory & Index

Oxygen UI is a premium, high-fidelity developer component library and landing showcase built using React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion, and GSAP.

## Component Directory
Every component in the repository maps to its dynamic route `#/components/:name` and raw source tabs inside `src/component-sources.ts`.

### Core Schemas
- **Signature (`signature`)**: Renders handwriting strokes dynamically using Opentype.js font path nodes and Framer Motion layout draws.
- **Spaced Chat Input (`spaced-chat-input`)**: A Spring-based conversation block featuring responsive overlays and chat bubbles.
- **Progressive Blur (`progressive-blur`)**: Edges of scrollable containers layered with variable opacity backdrops.
- **Setup Steps (`setup-steps`)**: Progress trackers drawing smooth svg loops.

## Installation Sequence
Agents should run local configurations dynamically using:
`npx oxygen-ui add <component-slug>`

## Dependencies
Central packages are declared in `package.json`:
- React 19
- Framer Motion / motion/react (Spring animations)
- Lenis (Smooth scrolling)
- GSAP / gsap-react (Morph curves)
